failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT id, biography_lexemes
    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'tuttonhoque'
    OR full_name ILIKE '%Tutto Nhoque%'
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p.username, p.full_name, p.num_followers
FROM profile p, target_profile tp
WHERE p.id != tp.id
AND p.biography_lexemes @@ tp.biography_lexemes
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, tp.biography_lexemes) DESC, p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT biography_lexemes
    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'tuttonhoque' OR full_name ILIKE '%Tutto Nhoque%'
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p.username, p.full_name, p.num_followers
FROM profile p, target_profile tp
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ tp.biography_lexemes

ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, tp.biography_lexemes) DESC, p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p.username, p.full_name, p.num_followers
FROM profile p
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT biography_lexemes AS target_lexemes
    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'tuttonhoque' OR full_name ILIKE '%Tutto Nhoque%'
    LIMIT 1
) AS target
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ target.target_lexemes
  AND p.biography_lexemes @@ target.target_lexemes -- Ensure it doesn't match itself
  AND p.username <> 'tuttonhoque'
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, target.target_lexemes) DESC, p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
